scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: every endpoint documented across the Coassemble headless API reference (Courses, Tracking, Identities, Collections, Translations). The base URL is https://api.coassemble.com; documented paths are prefixed /v1/headless/... in the public reference and /api/v1/headless/... in this connector's own base_url + stream path split (identical resulting URL; matches legacy's own path convention).

excluded.reason: single-course detail is a strict subset of the courses stream's own per-record shape already returned by GET /api/v1/headless/courses

returns a course's raw content-asset manifest (languages/variants/assets with signed CDN URLs) for embedding a learner-facing player, not a catalog/record-sync resource; no stable per-record shape suitable for a list stream
the API reference marks this endpoint deprecated

reverts a course to a prior content revision; a content-authoring/versioning action with no bounded, declarable request body documented (revision target is implicit/unspecified), not a plain record mutation
returns a downloadable SCORM package zip file, not a JSON record
the API reference marks this endpoint deprecated
the API reference marks this endpoint deprecated
single-tracking detail is a strict subset of the trackings stream's own per-record shape already returned by GET /api/v1/headless/trackings
single-collection-tracking detail is a strict subset of the collection_trackings stream's own per-record shape already returned by GET /api/v1/headless/collection/trackings

requires a screen id (a per-embed screen resource distinct from the screen_types lookup enum this connector already exposes); Coassemble's own API reference never defines a list/id endpoint for this screen-id resource, so there is no way to enumerate valid ids to read this stream against without an unverifiable guess at the id's source
single-client detail is a strict subset of the clients stream's own per-record shape already returned by GET /api/v1/headless/clients
single-user detail is a strict subset of the users stream's own per-record shape already returned by GET /api/v1/headless/users
single-collection detail is a strict subset of the collections stream's own per-record shape already returned by GET /api/v1/headless/collections
